title: paspalum stellatum
intro: Paspalum stellatum, also known as Star Paspalum, is a perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paspalum stellatum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a natural diuretic. Paspalum stellatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in folk medicine.
